name: Reforge
desc: Replace one secondary stat. Cost = (ilvl - 100) / 5 Shards. Exact odds shown before you commit.

name: Augment
desc: Add a secondary stat — which upgrades the item's quality tier (Blue + a 3rd secondary becomes Epic). Cost = (ilvl - 100) / 5 Shards.

name: Scrap
desc: Scrap gear into Shards = (number of secondaries) × (1 + key band). A junk Epic shards for far more than a Green.

name: Corrupt
desc: A one-way Vaal gamble (Legendary / season-end sink). The item is permanently locked from further crafting.

outcomes.effect: Shift each secondary ±1 tier (can exceed normal caps)
Stamp a corruption-only mod from the overpowered pool
